queries: ("Schizophrenia"[Mesh] OR schizophrenia[tiab] OR schizophrenic[tiab] OR schizoaffective[tiab] OR psychosis[tiab]) AND ("Autopsy"[Mesh] OR autopsy[tiab] OR postmortem[tiab] OR "post-mortem"[tiab] OR "brain bank"[tiab] OR "brain banks"[tiab]) AND ("Brain"[Mesh] OR brain[tiab] OR cortex[tiab] OR "gray matter"[tiab] OR "grey matter"[tiab]) AND (control*[tiab] OR "healthy control*"[tiab] OR "normal control*"[tiab] OR nonpsychiatric[tiab] OR "non-psychiatric"[tiab])

("Schizophrenia"[Mesh] OR schizophrenia[tiab] OR schizophren*[tiab]) AND ("Autopsy"[Mesh] OR autopsy[tiab] OR postmortem[tiab] OR "post-mortem"[tiab]) AND ("Brain"[Mesh] OR brain[tiab]) AND (microglia[tiab] OR "Microglia"[Mesh] OR microglial[tiab] OR "Astrocytes"[Mesh] OR astrocyte*[tiab] OR glia[tiab] OR glial[tiab] OR gliosis[tiab] OR "Glial Fibrillary Acidic Protein"[Mesh] OR GFAP[tiab] OR "Cytokines"[Mesh] OR cytokine*[tiab] OR interleukin*[tiab] OR IL-1[tiab] OR IL-6[tiab] OR "Tumor Necrosis Factor-alpha"[Mesh] OR TNF[tiab] OR "Arachidonic Acid"[Mesh] OR arachidon*[tiab] OR eicosanoid*[tiab] OR prostaglandin*[tiab] OR COX-2[tiab] OR "Phospholipases A2"[Mesh] OR PLA2[tiab] OR lipoxygenase*[tiab] OR "Substance P"[Mesh] OR "substance P"[tiab] OR SERPINA3[tiab] OR "alpha-1-antichymotrypsin"[tiab] OR "Alpha 1-Antichymotrypsin"[Mesh] OR IFITM[tiab] OR IFITM1[tiab] OR IFITM3[tiab] OR "interferon-induced transmembrane"[tiab] OR neuroinflamm*[tiab] OR "innate immune"[tiab]) AND (control*[tiab] OR "Case-Control Studies"[Mesh] OR "case control"[tiab])

("Schizophrenia"[Mesh] AND "Brain"[Mesh] AND ("Autopsy"[Mesh] OR "Tissue Banks"[Mesh]) AND (Microglia[Mesh] OR Astrocytes[Mesh] OR "Glial Fibrillary Acidic Protein"[Mesh] OR Cytokines[Mesh] OR "Interleukin-1beta"[Mesh] OR "Interleukin-6"[Mesh] OR "Tumor Necrosis Factor-alpha"[Mesh] OR "Arachidonic Acid"[Mesh] OR Eicosanoids[Mesh] OR Prostaglandins[Mesh] OR "Prostaglandin-Endoperoxide Synthases"[Mesh] OR "Phospholipases A2"[Mesh] OR Lipoxygenases[Mesh] OR "Substance P"[Mesh] OR "Alpha 1-Antichymotrypsin"[Mesh]) AND (Case-Control Studies[Mesh] OR Cross-Sectional Studies[Mesh] OR Cohort Studies[Mesh]) AND Humans[Mesh])

((schizophren*[tiab] OR "Schizophrenia Spectrum and Other Psychotic Disorders"[Mesh]) AND (postmortem[tiab] OR "post-mortem"[tiab] OR autopsy[tiab] OR "Autopsy"[Mesh] OR "brain bank"[tiab]) AND (brain[tiab] OR cortex[tiab] OR hippocamp*[tiab] OR "prefrontal cortex"[tiab])) AND (glial[tiab] OR glia[tiab] OR "glial density"[tiab] OR microglia*[tiab] OR astrocyt*[tiab] OR GFAP[tiab] OR cytokine*[tiab] OR IL-1*[tiab] OR IL-6[tiab] OR TNF[tiab] OR arachidon*[tiab] OR eicosanoid*[tiab] OR prostaglandin*[tiab] OR "substance P"[tiab] OR SERPINA3[tiab] OR IFITM*[tiab] OR neuroinflamm*[tiab]) AND ("case-control"[tiab] OR "case control"[tiab] OR cohort[tiab] OR "cross-sectional"[tiab] OR comparative[tiab] OR "Case-Control Studies"[Mesh] OR "Cohort Studies"[Mesh] OR "Cross-Sectional Studies"[Mesh])

("schizophrenia"[tiab] OR "Schizophrenia"[Mesh]) AND (postmortem[tiab] OR "post-mortem"[tiab] OR autopsy[tiab] OR "Autopsy"[Mesh] OR "postmortem brain"[tiab]) AND (microglia[tiab] OR microglial[tiab] OR astrocyte*[tiab] OR GFAP[tiab] OR "glial fibrillary acidic protein"[tiab] OR glial[tiab] OR gliosis[tiab] OR cytokine*[tiab] OR IFITM[tiab] OR IFITM1[tiab] OR IFITM3[tiab] OR SERPINA3[tiab] OR "alpha-1-antichymotrypsin"[tiab] OR "substance P"[tiab] OR arachidon*[tiab]) AND (immunohistochem*[tiab] OR "western blot"[tiab] OR ELISA[tiab] OR qPCR[tiab] OR "in situ hybridization"[tiab] OR stereolog*[tiab] OR mRNA[tiab] OR transcript*[tiab]) AND (control*[tiab] OR "healthy control*"[tiab] OR "non-psychiatric"[tiab] OR nonpsychiatric[tiab])

inclusion_criteria: Original human case-control or cross-sectional studies using postmortem brain tissue with schizophrenia diagnosed by DSM/ICD (or equivalent clinical records) and a healthy non-schizophrenic control group.

Report quantitative group-level measures in brain tissue of at least one neuroinflammatory marker: microglial markers (e.g., Iba1, CD68), GFAP expression, glial cell densities, cytokines, arachidonic cascade markers (e.g., COX/cPLA2 pathway), substance P, SERPINA3, or IFITM (protein or transcript).
Provide extractable data enabling comparison between schizophrenia and control groups (e.g., means/variances, medians/IQRs, counts, or effect sizes; schizophrenia data separable if mixed diagnoses).
exclusion_criteria: Not human postmortem brain tissue (e.g., animal/in vitro models, CSF or peripheral tissues, neuroimaging-only studies).
No healthy control group or schizophrenia diagnosis not confirmed/clearly defined.
Non-original or duplicate data (reviews, meta-analyses, editorials, case reports, conference abstracts without full data; overlapping cohorts without unique subjects).
Outcomes do not include the specified neuroinflammatory markers or results not reported in an extractable group-comparison format.
screening_criteria.description: Screen studies of human postmortem brain tissue comparing schizophrenia cases with healthy controls on neuroinflammatory markers (microglia, GFAP, glial densities, cytokines, arachidonic cascade markers, substance P, SERPINA3, IFITM).
